text.title: AI Incident Postmortem Examples
text.summary: Worked example: postmortem for a hallucination incident where the summariser invented a customer's account balance.

example.title: Filled report
Counter-example with blame language
example.code: Narrative: "QA failed to catch this case. Alex deployed a bad prompt without review."
example.note: Violates r3 (blameless). Rewrite: "The eval set lacked a numeric-grounding case; the prompt change cleared CI but did not exercise the failure mode."
